recommendations.title: Ready Player One
recommendations.overview: When the creator of a popular video game system dies, a virtual contest is created to compete for his fortune.

recommendations.title: The Jurassic Games
recommendations.overview: In the near future, 10 death row convicts are forced to compete in a virtual reality game that pits them against dinosaurs and each other.

recommendations.title: Total Recall

recommendations.title: Spy Kids 3-D: Game Over
recommendations.genres: Family, Action, Comedy, Adventure, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Carmen's caught in a virtual reality game designed by the Kids' new nemesis, the Toymaker. It's up to Juni to save his sister, and ultimately the world.

recommendations.title: Fabricated City
recommendations.overview: In real life, Kwon Yoo is unemployed, but in the virtual game world he is the best leader. Kwon Yoo is then framed for a murder. With the help of hacker Yeo-wool, he tries to uncover the truth behind the murder case.

recommendations.title: eXistenZ
recommendations.overview: A game designer on the run from assassins must play her latest virtual reality creation with a marketing trainee to determine if the game has been damaged.

recommendations.title: Virtual Revolution

recommendations.title: The Call Up
